message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant Client as "Client"
participant Facade as "Facade"
participant SystemA as "SystemA"
participant SystemB as "SystemB"
participant SystemC as "SystemC"

note right of Client
  1 create
note right of Facade
  2 create
  3 create
  4 create
note right of Facade
  5 wrapOpration()
  6 operationA()
  7 operationB()
  8 operation()
@endnote

Client ->> Facade: 1 create
Facade -> SystemA: 2 create
Facade -> SystemB: 3 create
Facade -> SystemC: 4 create

Client ->> Facade: 5 wrapOpration()
Facade -> SystemA: 6 operationA()
Facade -> SystemB: 7 operationB()
Facade -> SystemC: 8 operation()

@enduml
